arts.ttl: Juventus Furious Over Kolo Muani Deal Snag, Working with PSG to Resolve Issue
arts.sum: The Randal Kolo Muani transfer saga took an unexpected turn yesterday, as bureaucratic issues emerged to complicate the deal between Juventus and Paris Saint-Germain. While the Italian club had reportedly reached a full agreement with all parties involved, PSG realized they had exhausted their available loan slots, bringing the transfer to a standstill. arts.ttl: Zlatan Ibrahimovic comments on Kyle Walker move from Manchester City – Insistent AC Milan are doing right thing
arts.sum: Zlatan Ibrahimovic believes AC Milan are getting ‘a great player’ in Kyle Walker, who is set to join from Manchester City. Calciomercato cover comments from the former striker today after he spoke to DAZN before the clash with Juventus.
